title: Panoptic Audit Contest

audit.reason: The report provides a detailed analysis of two critical vulnerabilities in the Panoptic smart contracts, along with clear descriptions, locations, proof of concepts, and recommendations. The findings are well-structured and easy to understand.
audit.improvements: The report could benefit from including additional test cases and a more comprehensive analysis of the contract's overall security posture. Additionally, it would be helpful to include a section on how these vulnerabilities were discovered and the tools used during the audit.
